[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100000 2
1 10100101 4
2 10100101 4
3 11101110 6
4 11101101 6
5 00001100 2
6 10101001 4
7 01000001 2

01 10111111 7

67 11011111 7

71 10111110 6
